info.description: AI-powered volunteer scheduling and sign-up management
info.title: SignUpFlow API

get.description: API information endpoint.
Identify volunteers at risk of burnout (serving too frequently).
Get schedule health metrics.
Get volunteer participation statistics.
Return assignments belonging to the caller, scoped to their org via the join.

post.description: Mark the caller's assignment as confirmed.
Decline the caller's assignment with a reason.
Flag the caller's assignment for swap; admin follows up out of band.

get.description:
Return audit log rows scoped to the caller's organization.

Admin-only. Each call is itself recorded as a `data.exported` audit event
so reads of the audit log are themselves auditable.

post.description: Check if email is already registered.

Request a password reset token.

Always returns the same generic message regardless of whether the email
exists. Audits every request. The reset token is held in-memory and is
NEVER returned in the response in production. Set
`DEBUG_RETURN_RESET_TOKEN=true` in dev/test environments to opt into
receiving the token in the JSON body for E2E exercise.
Login with email and password. Rate limited to 5 requests per 5 minutes per IP.
Reset password using token.
Create a new user account. Rate limited to 3 requests per hour per IP.
Create availability record for a person.

get.description: Get all time-off periods for a person.

post.description: Add a time-off period for a person.

get.description:
Export personal schedule as ICS file.

This endpoint downloads an ICS file with all assigned events for a person.

Public calendar feed endpoint for subscriptions.

This endpoint is accessed by calendar applications using the subscription URL.
It returns an ICS file that is automatically refreshed by the calendar app.

Export all organization events as ICS file (admin only).

This endpoint is for administrators to export all events in the organization.

post.description:
Reset calendar subscription token for a person.

This invalidates the old subscription URL and generates a new one.
Use this if the subscription URL has been compromised.

get.description:
Get calendar subscription URL for a person.

Returns a webcal:// URL that can be used to subscribe to the calendar
in Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, etc.

List currently-detected conflicts across an org (admin-only).

Scans every Assignment in the org (or just the named person's) and
surfaces `time_off` and `double_booked` conflicts. `already_assigned`
is intentionally omitted because the assignment exists.

parameters.description: Optional filter to a single person
parameters.name: person_id

schema.description: Optional filter to a single person
schema.title: Person Id

post.description:
Check for scheduling conflicts before assigning a person to an event.

Detects:
- Already assigned to this event
- Time-off periods overlapping with event
- Double-booked (assigned to another event at the same time)

get.description: List constraints. Always scoped to the caller's organization.

post.description: Create a new constraint (admin only, scoped to admin's org).

delete.description: Delete constraint (admin only, scoped to admin's org).

get.description: Get constraint by ID; org isolation enforced.

put.description: Update constraint (admin only, scoped to admin's org).

get.description: List events with optional filters.

parameters.description: Filter events starting after this time
parameters.name: start_after

schema.description: Filter events starting after this time
schema.title: Start After

parameters.description: Filter events starting before this time
parameters.name: start_before

schema.description: Filter events starting before this time
schema.title: Start Before

parameters.description: Case-insensitive search on event type and id
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Case-insensitive search on event type and id
schema.title: Q

post.description: Create a new event (admin only).

get.description: Get all assignments for an organization (both from solutions and manual).
Get event by ID.

post.description: Assign or unassign a person to/from an event (admin only).

get.description:
Get people available for this event based on roles.

Returns list of people who have matching roles, with flags indicating
if they're already assigned or have blocked the event date.

schema.title: Response Get Available People Api V1 Events  Event Id  Available People Get

get.description:
Validate if event has proper configuration and enough people.

Checks:
1. Event has role requirements configured
2. Enough people available for each role
3. No assigned people are blocked on the event date

Returns:
    Dictionary with is_valid flag and list of validation warnings

schema.title: Response Validate Event Api V1 Events  Event Id  Validation Get

get.description:
List all invitations for an organization (admin only).

Requires JWT authentication via Authorization header.

parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, accepted, expired, cancelled)
parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by status (pending, accepted, expired, cancelled)
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Case-insensitive search on email and name
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Case-insensitive search on email and name
schema.title: Q

post.description:
Create a new invitation (admin only). Rate limited to 10 requests per 5 minutes per IP.

Sends an invitation email to a new user to join the organization.

Resend an invitation email (admin only).

Generates a new token and extends the expiry date.

get.description:
Verify an invitation token. Rate limited to 10 requests per minute per IP.

Checks if the invitation is valid and not expired.

post.description:
Accept an invitation and create a new account.

This creates a new Person with the invited roles and marks the invitation as accepted.

get.description: List all organizations. Excludes cancelled by default.

parameters.description: Include organizations that have been cancelled (admin view)
parameters.name: include_cancelled

schema.description: Include organizations that have been cancelled (admin view)
schema.title: Include Cancelled

post.description:
Create a new organization. Rate limited to 2 requests per hour per IP.

Automatically creates Free plan subscription with 10 volunteer limit.

delete.description: Delete organization and all related data.

get.description: Get organization by ID.

post.description:
Soft-cancel the organization (admin only).

Sets `cancelled_at` to now and schedules a 30-day data-retention window
via `data_retention_until`. The org is excluded from the default list
until restored.
Restore a cancelled organization (admin only). Clears cancellation fields.

get.description: List people. Users can only see people from their own organization.

parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across name and email
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Case-insensitive search across name and email
schema.title: Q

post.description: Create a new person (admin only).

get.description: Get the current authenticated user's profile.

put.description: Update the current authenticated user's profile.

get.description: Get person by ID. Users can only view people from their own organization.

put.description: Update person. Users can edit themselves, admins can edit anyone in their org.

get.description: List solutions with optional filters.

post.description:
Create a manual solution record (for testing or external import).
Note: This does not create assignments, just the solution metadata.

get.description: Get solution by ID.
Get all assignments for a solution.

post.description: Export solution in various formats (CSV, ICS, JSON).
Publish a solution (admin only). Unpublishes any prior published in the same org.
Unpublish a solution (admin only).

Generate a schedule for the organization (admin only).

This endpoint:
1. Loads all org data from database
2. Runs the constraint solver
3. Saves the solution to database
4. Returns solution metrics and violations

get.description: List teams. Users can only see teams from their own organization.

parameters.description: Case-insensitive search on name and description
parameters.name: q

schema.description: Case-insensitive search on name and description
schema.title: Q

post.description: Create a new team (admin only).

get.description: Get team by ID. Users can only view teams from their own organization.

post.description: Add members to team (admin only).

get.description:
Health check endpoint with database connectivity check.

Returns:
    200 OK: Service and database are healthy
    503 Service Unavailable: Database connection failed
